channel.description: A space to share my continuous journey of learning about fundamentals and software craft

item.title: Doing nothing is doing something

item.title: Running home
item.description: Preparing for a half marathon reshaped my life.

item.title: A year for self-discovery
item.description: No resolutions. Just things I dare to try in 2026

item.title: Hello world, again!
item.description: Coming back to blogging after five years
